text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew… That hit the spot.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Special Week… You're not going back for more?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. Five bowls will do… Sorry, I should head out.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (…Mom.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Stop, stop! I can't be homesick already! I just got here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Does her stomach hurt, maybe?)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka, sorry to disturb you during 
your meal, but can I have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, yes… What is it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's about this weekend's planned scrimmage. 
There's an open spot.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I know you were previously injured, and this scrimmage 
seems like a good opportunity to get you back on the track. 
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Racing in the scrimmage? Um… Well, yes… 
If it means I can run…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it ironic? I came to this school and started entering 
races because I love running. But that's exactly what lead 
to my injury.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Something wrong? Are you still not feeling up to it, perchance?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, um… Sorry. Can I have a little time to think?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
…I see. Very well, then. I certainly won't force you. 
But let me know as soon as you've made your decision.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right… Good night, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, good night, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Tomorrow will bring more classes and training… 
Will I be able to get the hang of things? Or…)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(I really do want to race, but if I get 
injured again at the scrimmage…)

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Siiigh…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm-hm-hmmm♪ What to do? What to do?♪ 
Wonder if I can find something fun. To. Dooo— Oh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! New! Giiirl! What's up? Gotten used to the academy yet?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Teio…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why are you looking so glum?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Gotcha. So that's what's got you down in the dumps.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I thought I was prepared to face some tough challenges here, but this is beyond anything I could have imagined… Sigh…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see, I see… Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: This won't do!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: This won't do! Won't do at all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I know the classes and training sessions are hard here, 
and I get that you're stressed because everyone's so fast…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But if that's what the academy represents to you, then that's a real shame!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It is? Really?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yup! And I'll tell you why.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You still haven't learned the very best thing about this place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The best thing? What could that be?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: If you wanna know… come with me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, wait, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Come on! Hurry up and follow me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: W-Wait, please! Huh? Why am I getting déjà vu?!
